personal_info.name: Unknown
personal_info.summary: Full-stack Software Engineer with 4 years of experience building scalable systems, REST APIs, and data pipelines. Proficient in Python, Java, and cloud infrastructure.

experience.title: Software Engineer
responsibilities: Designed and developed RESTful APIs in Python and Java serving 500k+ daily requests.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 40%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile sprints to deliver features on schedule.
Optimized MySQL and PostgreSQL queries, improving report generation speed by 35%.
Conducted code reviews and mentored two junior developers on best practices.

experience.title: Junior Developer
responsibilities: Developed and maintained Java-based web applications using JSP and Servlets.
Wrote unit tests using JUnit, achieving 80% code coverage across core modules.
Assisted in migrating legacy codebase from Ant to Maven build system.
Supported client-facing demos and prepared technical documentation.

projects.name: Inventory Management API
projects.description: Built a RESTful API service for real-time inventory tracking across 12 warehouses, with role-based access control and audit logging.
projects.impact: Reduced stock discrepancy reports by 60% within first quarter of deployment.

projects.name: Log Anomaly Detector
projects.description: Developed a pipeline that ingests application logs, parses them with regex, and flags anomalies using a simple statistical model.
projects.impact: Caught 3 production incidents 20 minutes before they escalated to user-facing outages.

achievements: Awarded 'Best New Engineer' at Infosys internal hackathon 2021.
Published a tech blog post on Django REST Framework optimization with 4,000+ views.
Led the college team to runner-up position at Smart Hackathon 2018.

publications.title: Efficient API Rate Limiting Strategies in Django

workshops.name: Cloud Native Development with AWS
workshops.description: Completed hands-on workshop covering EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS deployment patterns.

workshops.name: Docker and Kubernetes for Developers
workshops.description: Completed workshop on containerization and orchestration fundamentals using Docker and Kubernetes.

internships.title: Software Development Intern
internships.description: Worked on internal HR portal backend, implementing leave management and attendance tracking modules.
internships.impact: Delivered leave management module 2 weeks ahead of schedule, adopted by 300+ employees.

projects.name: HR Leave Management Module
projects.description: End-to-end leave request, approval workflow, and reporting dashboard for HR administrators.
projects.impact: Automated a previously manual process saving HR team approximately 8 hours per week.

certifications: AWS Certified Developer - Associate | Amazon Web Services | 2022. Oracle Certified Associate Java SE 8 | Oracle | 2019. Python for Everybody | Coursera / University of Michigan | 2020.
